no: Beta v0.95 (mid-2000s). Uses wholesale CRE replacement (COPY not COPY_EXISTING) — destroys ALL prior mod changes to NPC creature files. No EE/EET awareness. Fundamentally incompatible with SCS, ToF, npc_ee NPC customization in modded installs.

conflicts.reason: Hidden Kits replaces NPC CRE files wholesale, destroying SCS NPC customization changes. Fundamentally incompatible.
Hidden Kits replaces NPC CRE files wholesale, destroying ToF NPC customization changes.
Both modify NPC kits. Hidden Kits replaces CRE files wholesale, overwriting npc_ee changes.
Both assign kits to NPCs. Hidden Kits replaces CRE files wholesale.
Both assign kits to NPCs. Hidden Kits replaces CRE files wholesale.
Both modify xplevel.2da Druid row. Last installed wins.

passive.desc: Fighter level trails Mage by 1 after activation. -2 AC and -3 THAC0 when ability inactive.

activated.effects: 12 hrs, undispellable. AC set to 1 (+1 at 16/20/25/31). Struck targets drain 1d4 HP. Lv20+: -1 casting speed.

restrictions.items: Fighter→Mage dual at lv12. Loses 75K XP per level gained.

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter→Mage dual. Mage spellcasting available after class activation.

statBonus.note: Permanent -2 AC, -3 THAC0 when Arcane Armor inactive.

hlaPool.note: Fighter→Mage dual. Custom Arcane Armor ability.

passive.desc: Fighter level trails Druid by 1. Choose: Melee (+2 THAC0, +7 dmg melee; -10 THAC0 missiles) or Druidic Magic (-3 casting speed, permanent Improved Alacrity; -7 THAC0 physical).

restrictions.items: Fighter→Druid dual at lv12. Loses all shapeshifting. Loses 75K XP per level.

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter→Druid dual. Druid spellcasting available after class activation. Loses all shapeshifting.

statBonus.note: Melee specialization path (+2 THAC0, +7 melee dmg) or Druidic Magic path (-3 casting speed).

hlaPool.note: Fighter→Druid dual. Melee or Druidic Magic specialization.

passive.desc: Fighter level trails Thief by 1. Lv18+: -7 THAC0 missiles, -15 trap setting/pickpocketing.

restrictions.items: Fighter→Thief dual at lv12. Loses all snare traps. HLA: +1 backstab multiplier (2x selectable).

hlaPool.note: Fighter→Thief dual. Custom HLA: +1 backstab multiplier (2x selectable)

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter→Thief dual. No spellcasting. Loses all snare traps.

passive.desc: Mage level trails Thief by 1. Takes 30% extra missile damage (except during Obfuscation).

activated.effects: 6 hrs: Improved Invisibility, MR 10%+10%/tier, Non-Detection at 24+.

restrictions.items: Mage→Thief dual at lv12. No snare traps. Loses 112.5K XP per level (highest penalty).

spellRestrictions.note: Mage→Thief dual. Mage spellcasting retained. No snare traps.

statBonus.note: Takes 30% extra missile damage (except during Obfuscation).

hlaPool.note: Mage→Thief dual. Obfuscation ability (Improved Invisibility + MR).

passive.desc: Fighter level trails Cleric by 1. Permanent -5 THAC0 missiles.

activated.effects: 6 hrs: +1 STR/DEX/CON per 4 caster levels (max +5). Lv24+: STR set to 25. While active: -16 THAC0 missiles.

restrictions.items: Fighter→Cleric dual at lv12. Loses 75K XP per level.

spellRestrictions.note: Fighter→Cleric dual. Cleric spellcasting available after class activation.

hlaPool.note: Fighter→Cleric dual. Channel Holy Might innate.

passive.desc: Cleric level trails Mage by 1. Permanent -4 AC except during Arcane Sanctuary.

activated.effects: 12 hrs: AC set to 3 (+1/tier). Lv20+: backstab immunity. HLA Conduit: -1 casting time, costs lv8 slot.

restrictions.items: Cleric→Mage dual at lv12. Loses 67.5K XP per level.

hlaPool.note: Cleric→Mage dual. Custom HLA: Conduit (-1 casting time, costs lv8 slot)

spellRestrictions.note: Cleric→Mage dual. Both cleric and mage spellcasting after activation.

statBonus.note: Permanent -4 AC except during Arcane Sanctuary.

passive.desc: Cleric level trails Ranger by 1. Receives Divine Bow +3 and Divine Blades +3 (arrows as +5 enchantment).

restrictions.items: Cleric→Ranger dual at lv12. Cannot cast cleric spells while wielding divine weapons. -3 THAC0 without divine weapons. -30 stealth.

spellRestrictions.note: Cleric→Ranger dual. Cannot cast cleric spells while wielding divine weapons.

statBonus.note: Permanent -3 THAC0 without divine weapons. -30 stealth.

new: Druid guardian of ancient forests. Enhanced plant magic and woodland defense.
Thief wielding shadow-forged weapons. Enhanced stealth and shadow strikes.
Mage who channels magic through steel. Armored caster with blade skills.
Thief using eldritch magic to phase through barriers. Ghostly abilities.
High-ranking cleric with enhanced divine authority and leadership powers.
Master wizard with enhanced spell power and arcane mastery abilities.
Ranger enforcing natural law. Combines tracking with nature-based justice.

sum: Introduces hidden dual-class kits obtained at level 12 with accelerated inactive class leveling and unique abilities. Optionally applies kits to Bioware NPCs.

co.no: Adds hidden dual-class kit system triggered at level 12. Extends DPLAYER3.BCS.

co.n: Druid XP set to Mage XP for levels 14-20
co.tp2n: Druid XP Req set to Mage XP Req for levels 14-20
co.no: Modifies xplevel.2da Druid row. Conflicts with cdtweaks and other XP table mods.
Replaces Aerie CRE files. Cleric→Mage dual-class kit.
Replaces Imoen CRE files. Mage→Thief dual-class kit.
Replaces Jaheira CRE files. Fighter→Druid dual-class kit.
Replaces Jan CRE files. Mage→Thief dual-class kit.
Replaces Korgan CRE files. Fighter→Thief dual-class kit.

co.no: Replaces Mazzy CRE files. Fighter→Cleric dual-class kit. Adds modified items.
Replaces Minsc CRE files. Cleric→Ranger dual-class kit.
Replaces Sarevok CRE. Fighter→Mage dual-class kit.

co.tp2n: Valygar the Sylvan Justicar, w/ Modified Item
co.no: Replaces Valygar CRE files. Cleric→Ranger dual-class kit. Adds modified item.
Replaces Viconia CRE files. Fighter→Cleric dual-class kit.
Replaces Yoshimo CRE files. Fighter→Thief dual-class kit.
